description:
Advances: specled.api_boundary

Discovered while implementing specled_-155.1 (store v2 envelope).

lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex strip_meta/1 recurses into an
AST nodes trailing args list but does NOT recurse into the leading form
position of a 3-tuple node. For a remote-call guard like is_binary(path)
(expanded to an {:erlang, :is_binary} dotted-call form), the form element
itself is {:., meta, [Module, :fun]} - its meta (carrying line/column) is
copied into the canonical shape unstripped, since strip_metas
{form, _meta, args} clause keeps form as-is instead of also calling
strip_meta(form).

Net effect: ApiBoundary.hash/2 claims to be stable under line-number shifts
in the function body (its own moduledoc says so), but for ANY function
whose head carries a remote-call guard (e.g. when is_binary(x), when
is_list(x) - both expand to :erlang.* remote calls), the hash silently
depends on that guards source line/column. Any unrelated edit that shifts
lines above such a function in the same file produces a spurious
branch_guard_realization_drift finding, even though the functions own
arity/arg-pattern/guard semantics did not change.

Reproduced concretely: adding ~140 lines of new functions/moduledoc before
SpecLedEx.Coverage.Store.read/1, write/2, and build_records/1 (each guarded
with is_binary/is_list) flipped their committed api_boundary hashes with
zero change to those functions own source. Confirmed by diffing the
resolved AST and by hashing on base vs branch with mix compile --force in
between (ruling out stale-build artifacts).

Fix direction: recurse into form too in the {form, _meta, args} clause of
strip_meta/1 (and likely in normalize_clauses guard handling more
generally) so remote-call metadata is stripped consistently with the rest
of the AST.

Workaround used in specled_-155.1: restructured the diff so zero existing
lines shifted above the bound functions (all new content appended after
read/1, before the private fetch! helper) - avoided the bug rather than
fixing it, since api_boundary.ex is outside that tickets Allowed touches.
title: ApiBoundary strip_meta leaks line/column metadata from remote-call guard forms
